channel.title: Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery Updates
channel.description: Official Sparkle updates for the Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery app.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Lofree Dongle Battery 1.0.1

  • Updates the public release so it matches the final menu layout and update menu ordering.
  • Keeps the same live 2.4 GHz battery monitoring behavior for the tested Flow Lite100 setup.
  • Keeps manual in-app update checks through the official GitHub-hosted Sparkle feed.
